response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with ~16 years of experience, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategic leadership. Resume shows only recent, limited AI-adjacent work (MCP code generators at re:cinq since April 2025) and no evidence of leading large-scale AI initiatives, advising strategic customers, or building recognized AI products. Cloud experience is also light (AWS CDK at Optilyz) with no indication of platform-scale architecture or executive-level influence expected at Principal/Director IC level.
strengths: ~16 years of broad engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching and workshops
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating end-to-end product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Limited cloud strategy depth; no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving platform direction
Career trajectory is senior IC, not Principal/Director-level technical leadership with org-wide influence

key_factors.factor: Long, diverse engineering track record with craftsmanship focus
